name: MKSystem Corporation
summary: MKSystem Corporation provides system development and ASP services in Japan. It operates in two segments, Shalom Business and CuBe Business. The company provides DirectHR, a solution for corporate personnel and general affairs divisions. It is also involved in the contracted development of front-end systems for the personnel and general affairs divisions of large companies to enhance their business processes. In addition, the company offers GooooN cloud services. It serves social insurance labor consultant offices, social insurance labor consulting corporations, labor insurance office associations, SR management labor centers, and general companies. MKSystem Corporation was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
